zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Curwen於大約1485年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾武坡 斯勞特時，她的父親Cospatric Collett26歲，母親Elizabeth Curwen22歲。她於1507年與Sir Thomas Collett在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾武坡 斯勞特聖 比特也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1557年在她的家鄉享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾武坡 斯勞特聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Curwen于大约1485年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾武坡 斯勞特时，她的父亲Cospatric Collett26岁，母亲Elizabeth Curwen22岁。她于1507年与Sir Thomas Collett在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾武坡 斯勞特聖 比特也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1557年在她的家乡享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾武坡 斯勞特聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Curwen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place called Culewen (now Colvend) in Kirkcudbrightshire. The family was early established in Lancashire, where it was often pronounced without the -w-; see Corrin and Currin .

variants.name: Corrin
meanings: Irish and Manx: shortened form of Mac Torin, from Gaelic mac ‘son (of)’ + Old Norse Thórfinnr (from Thórr, the name of the Scandinavian thunder god, + the ethnic designation Finnr). Compare Turpin . This name has occasionally been confused with Corin .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Curwen was born about 1485, in Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Cospatric Collett, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth Curwen, was 22. She married Sir Thomas Collett in 1507, in St Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died about 1557, in her hometown, at the age of 74, and was buried in St Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Curwen est née environ 1485, à Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Cospatric Collett, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Curwen, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Collett en 1507, à St Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1557, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à St Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Curwenが約1485年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウップエル スラウターで生まれた時，父Cospatric Collettは26歳，母Elizabeth Curwenは22歳であった。1507年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウップエル スラウタースト ペテル'ス チャーチでSir Thomas Collettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1557年に故郷で74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウップエル スラウタースト ペテル'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, C: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 업퍼 슬로그h터 스트 피터'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Curwen(이)가 대략 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 업퍼 슬로그h터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Cospatric Collett(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Curwen(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1507년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 업퍼 슬로그h터 스트 피터'스 c후르치에서 Sir Thomas Collett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1557년 그녀의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 업퍼 슬로그h터 스트 피터'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Curwen nasceu aproximadamente 1485, em Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Cospatric Collett, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Curwen, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Collett em 1507, em St Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1557, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em St Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, C: ст питир'с чурч, уппир слотир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Curwen родилась около 1485 г. в местности уппир слотир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Cospatric Collett было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Curwen, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Collett в 1507 г. в местности ст питир'с чурч, уппир слотир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла около 1557 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности ст питир'с чурч, уппир слотир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
